name: Amarnath Cave Temple
description: One of the most revered Hindu shrines, located at 3,888 meters. It is famous for a natural ice stalagmite that forms inside the cave, worshipped as the Shiva Linga.
history: According to legend, this is the exact cave where Lord Shiva explained the secret of life and eternity to Goddess Parvati.
famousFor: Natural ice Shiva Linga, highly challenging pilgrimage trek.
bestTime: July to August (During the Yatra only)
